title: Neural cusp
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Neural cusps''' were [[Yuuzhan Vong]] technology used in [[Tall-Yor|cognition hoods]] and [[cognition throne]]s. They were wormlike tendrils that surrounded the users head for sensory feeds.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''

[[Category:Yuuzhan Vong technology]]
